pitchEn: An automatic message-reply assistant that answers for you by your own rules: keyword triggers with ready replies, office hours, away messages, and allow/block lists. It logs every auto-reply and notifies you, and includes a built-in demo inbox so you can test everything instantly.
newFeaturesEn: First release: rule-based auto-replies with keywords, office hours, allow/block lists, a demo inbox, and local notifications for every answer sent.

dataHandling.notes: Rules and reply logs are stored on the device only. Network is used optionally to connect the KCY chat channel over HTTP. No account, no contacts, no tracking.

reviewerRemarksEn: No account or login is needed. On first launch choose a language, then tap 'Activate the robot — free' on the onboarding screen. Open the 'Demo' (inbox) tab and send a test message; the bot matches your rules and auto-replies, and the reply appears in the dashboard log. Nothing external is required to evaluate the app.
